label: trial_00
phase1_raw:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CommandRouter",
      "purpose": "Route incoming command to the appropriate handler",
      "behavior": "Reads the command field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function (e.g., CreateOrder, PayOrder, etc.) based on command value.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CreateOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle order creation",
      "behavior": "Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, and creates a new order record.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle order payment",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, and updates order status to paid.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle order shipping",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and is paid, then updates order status to shipped.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle order completion",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and is shipped, then updates order status to completed.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle order cancellation",
      "behavior": "Validates order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user if paid, and updates order status to cancelled.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrders",
      "purpose": "List orders with optional filters",
      "behavior": "Retrieves orders from data store, applies optional filters by user and status, and returns the filtered list.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrders",
      "purpose": "Get all orders for a user with statistics",
      "behavior": "Retrieves all orders for a given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, and returns the data.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProducts",
      "purpose": "List products with optional low stock filter",
      "behavior": "Retrieves products from data store, optionally filters by low stock threshold, and returns the list.",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine specialized child functions, each handling a distinct command (create, pay, ship, complete, cancel, list orders, get user orders, list products). This separation ensures each child has a single responsibility, operates at the same abstraction level, and minimizes overlap. The parent directly invokes the router, which then calls the appropriate handler.",
  "dataflow_edges": [
    {
      "from_node": "parent",
      "from_output": "input",
      "to_node": "CommandRouter",
      "to_input": "input",
      "note": "Parent passes the entire input JSON to the router for command dispatching."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "CreateOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to CreateOrder when command is 'create_order'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "PayOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to PayOrder when command is 'pay_order'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "ShipOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to ShipOrder when command is 'ship_order'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "CompleteOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to CompleteOrder when command is 'complete_order'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "CancelOrder",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to CancelOrder when command is 'cancel_order'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "ListOrders",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to ListOrders when command is 'list_orders'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "GetUserOrders",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to GetUserOrders when command is 'get_user_orders'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CommandRouter",
      "from_output": "command_and_data",
      "to_node": "ListProducts",
      "to_input": "order_data",
      "note": "Router sends order_data to ListProducts when command is 'list_products'."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CreateOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_output": "output",
      "note": "CreateOrder returns its result to the parent for final output."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "PayOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_output": "output",
      "note": "PayOrder returns its result to the parent."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ShipOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_output": "output",
      "note": "ShipOrder returns its result to the parent."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CompleteOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_output": "output",
      "note": "CompleteOrder returns its result to the parent."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "CancelOrder",
      "from_output": "result",
      "to_node": "parent",
      "to_output": "output",
      "note": "CancelOrder returns its result to the parent."
    },
    {
      "from_node": "ListOrders",
      "from_output": "result",

  ]
}

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Route incoming command to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function (e.g., CreateOrder, PayOrder, etc.) based on command value.

children.name: CreateOrder
children.behavior: Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, and creates a new order record.

children.name: PayOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, and updates order status to paid.

children.name: ShipOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is paid, then updates order status to shipped.

children.name: CompleteOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is shipped, then updates order status to completed.

children.name: CancelOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user if paid, and updates order status to cancelled.

children.name: ListOrders
children.behavior: Retrieves orders from data store, applies optional filters by user and status, and returns the filtered list.

children.name: GetUserOrders
children.purpose: Get all orders for a user with statistics
children.behavior: Retrieves all orders for a given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, and returns the data.

children.name: ListProducts
children.purpose: List products with optional low stock filter
children.behavior: Retrieves products from data store, optionally filters by low stock threshold, and returns the list.

phase1_parsed.decomposition_rationale: The Order Management System is decomposed into a CommandRouter that dispatches to nine specialized child functions, each handling a distinct command (create, pay, ship, complete, cancel, list orders, get user orders, list products). This separation ensures each child has a single responsibility, operates at the same abstraction level, and minimizes overlap. The parent directly invokes the router, which then calls the appropriate handler.

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes the entire input JSON to the router for command dispatching.
Router sends order_data to CreateOrder when command is 'create_order'.
Router sends order_data to PayOrder when command is 'pay_order'.
Router sends order_data to ShipOrder when command is 'ship_order'.
Router sends order_data to CompleteOrder when command is 'complete_order'.
Router sends order_data to CancelOrder when command is 'cancel_order'.
Router sends order_data to ListOrders when command is 'list_orders'.
Router sends order_data to GetUserOrders when command is 'get_user_orders'.
Router sends order_data to ListProducts when command is 'list_products'.
CreateOrder returns its result to the parent for final output.
PayOrder returns its result to the parent.
ShipOrder returns its result to the parent.
CompleteOrder returns its result to the parent.
CancelOrder returns its result to the parent.
ListOrders returns its result to the parent.
GetUserOrders returns its result to the parent.
ListProducts returns its result to the parent.

children.name: CommandRouter
children.purpose: Route incoming command to the appropriate handler
children.behavior: Reads the command field from input JSON and dispatches to the corresponding child function (e.g., CreateOrder, PayOrder, etc.) based on command value.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: System input JSON containing 'command' and 'order_data' fields

outputs.name: command
outputs.description: Extracted command value to determine which handler to call

outputs.name: order_data
outputs.description: Extracted order_data from input, passed to the appropriate handler
outputs.consumer: CreateOrder, PayOrder, ShipOrder, CompleteOrder, CancelOrder, ListOrders, GetUserOrders, ListProducts

children.name: CreateOrder
children.behavior: Validates user existence, checks product stock, calculates total price, deducts stock, and creates a new order record.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing user_id, product_id, quantity, etc.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and order_id

children.name: PayOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is pending, checks user balance, deducts balance, and updates order status to paid.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing order_id and user_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and updated order info

children.name: ShipOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is paid, then updates order status to shipped.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and updated order info

children.name: CompleteOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is shipped, then updates order status to completed.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and updated order info

children.name: CancelOrder
children.behavior: Validates order exists and is pending or paid, restores product stock, refunds user if paid, and updates order status to cancelled.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing order_id and user_id

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and updated order info

children.name: ListOrders
children.behavior: Retrieves orders from data store, applies optional filters by user and status, and returns the filtered list.

inputs.name: order_data
inputs.description: Order data containing optional user_id and status filters

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and list of orders

children.name: GetUserOrders
children.purpose: Get all orders for a user with statistics
children.behavior: Retrieves all orders for a given user, calculates total spent and status distribution, and returns the data.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, orders list, total_spent, and status_distribution

children.name: ListProducts
children.purpose: List products with optional low stock filter
children.behavior: Retrieves products from data store, optionally filters by low stock threshold, and returns the list.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: Result JSON with success, message, and list of products

parent_outputs_produced_by.output: CreateOrder, PayOrder, ShipOrder, CompleteOrder, CancelOrder, ListOrders, GetUserOrders, ListProducts

dataflow_edges.note: Parent passes the entire input JSON to the router for command dispatching.
Router sends order_data to CreateOrder when command is 'create_order'.
Router sends order_data to PayOrder when command is 'pay_order'.
Router sends order_data to ShipOrder when command is 'ship_order'.
Router sends order_data to CompleteOrder when command is 'complete_order'.
Router sends order_data to CancelOrder when command is 'cancel_order'.
Router sends order_data to ListOrders when command is 'list_orders'.
Router sends order_data to GetUserOrders when command is 'get_user_orders'.
Router sends order_data to ListProducts when command is 'list_products'.
CreateOrder returns its result to the parent for final output.
PayOrder returns its result to the parent.
ShipOrder returns its result to the parent.
CompleteOrder returns its result to the parent.
CancelOrder returns its result to the parent.
ListOrders returns its result to the parent.
GetUserOrders returns its result to the parent.
ListProducts returns its result to the parent.
